scripts.build:android: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-unified
scripts.build:apk: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile apk-unified --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:unified: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p android --profile apk-unified --non-interactive
scripts.build:apk:unified:queue: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p android --profile apk-unified --non-interactive --no-wait

scripts.build:apk:assistant: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p android --profile apk-assistant --non-interactive
scripts.assets:menu:verify: npm run verify:menu-assets && npm run verify:menu-visual-pro
scripts.assets:menu:stock:smash: node scripts/fetch-menu-stock-photos.mjs smash-1 smash-2 smash-3 smash-4
scripts.build:apk:preview: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p android --profile preview --non-interactive

scripts.build:dev:android:queue: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile development-husko --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.build:dev:android:legacy: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas build -p android --profile development --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p ios --profile ios-internal --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:gerant: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build -p ios --profile ios-gerant --non-interactive

scripts.build:mobile: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EAS_BUILD_AUTOCOMMIT=1 eas build --profile mobile --platform all
scripts.eas:sync:maps:verify: npm run eas:sync:maps && npm run release:check
scripts.eas:sync:secrets: npm run eas:sync:firebase && npm run eas:sync:maps
scripts.eas:sync:firebase:verify: npm run eas:sync:firebase && npm run firebase:env:check
scripts.release:chantiers: npm run verify && npm run chantiers:check
scripts.eas:prebuild: npm run release:check && npm run validate:expo
scripts.eas:update:client: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=client EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel client --platform android --environment production --message "Mise a jour Husko Client" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:gerant: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=gerant EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel gerant --platform android --environment production --message "Mise a jour Husko Gerant" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:livreur: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=livreur EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel livreur --platform android --environment production --message "Mise a jour Husko Livreur" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:hub: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=all EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel hub --platform android --environment production --message "Husko By Night — OTA hub" --non-interactive
scripts.eas:update:assistant: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=assistant EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true eas update --channel assistant --platform android --environment production --message "Husko Copilote — OTA" --non-interactive
scripts.release:doctor: npm run security:check:strict && npm run eas:prebuild
scripts.release:ready: npm run release:gate && npm run release:doctor
scripts.verify: npx tsc --noEmit && npx expo lint && npm run validate:expo && npm run verify:menu-assets && npm run verify:product-direction
scripts.verify:all: npm run preflight && npm run verify
scripts.release:gate: npm run preflight && npm run security:check && npm run verify && npm run release:check
scripts.release:gate:pro: npm run release:gate && npm run verify:menu-visual-pro:strict
scripts.test:ci: npm run verify:all && npx expo export --platform web
